name: swag
tagline: A secure Docker-based reverse proxy with automatic SSL and sane defaults
description: SWAG (Secure Web Application Gateway) is a Docker image that bundles Nginx, Let’s Encrypt, and security defaults to provide a secure reverse proxy and SSL gateway for self-hosted services.

features.title: Reverse Proxy
features.description: Route external traffic to internal services

features.title: HTTPS Certificates
features.description: Obtain and renew TLS certificates automatically

features.title: Security Headers
features.description: Add common security headers to responses

features.title: Logging
features.description: View proxy access and error logs

features.title: Self-Hosted Deployment
features.description: Run the proxy on your own infrastructure
